About Big Softie
Big Softie opened in 2019 in the Summerhill neighborhood right next door to one of Atlanta's most beloved bakeries, Little Tart Bakeshop. What started as a simple homage to the soft-serve of Sarah O'Brien's youth in her native Ohio, grew into a thriving business with a line wrapped around the building on summer nights and weekends.
With organic dairy and local, quality ingredients, we work to bring you the best soft-serve we can offer. We love partnering with local farms for seasonal toppings and flavors while also keeping our cherished classics, like a vanilla swirl with chocolate hardshell and sprinkles, available year-round.
We love watching folks' eyes light up when we set their cone down in front of them. Hopefully, we'll see you in the shop for your favorite swirl soon.

About | Big Softie
Main content starts here, tab to start navigating
About Us
Our Story
We are excited to celebrate our incredible journey with you! It's been an incredible experience turning cherished family recipes into a beloved dining experience. If our dishes don't remind you of home, then you just haven't tried enough yet!
Our Philosophy
We are dedicated to using the freshest ingredients and time-honored recipes to create dishes that are both flavorful and comforting. Our menu features a variety of options to cater to different tastes and dietary preferences, ensuring there is something for everyone.
The Experience
Whether you are joining us for a casual lunch, a romantic dinner, or a festive gathering, we strive to provide an inviting and enjoyable atmosphere. Our attentive staff is here to ensure that your dining experience is exceptional from start to finish.
Visit Us
We invite you to come and experience the unique charm of our restaurant. Whether you are a regular guest or visiting for the first time, we look forward to welcoming you and making your time with us delightful and memorable.
Our Team
John K.

meta.meta_description: Our soft serve is made with the best ingredients, including local, organic dairy and organic cane sugar. Toppings and waffle cones are all made in-house.
